switching_aware_readout_law.core_statement: Readout succeeds only when family transport budget and phase transport condition are jointly satisfied.
switching_aware_readout_law.formal_form: Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) = Tau_read^(f_c) + Phi(mode_1 -> mode_2) - switch_cost(c, mode_1, mode_2)

interpretation.phase_term: Phi(mode_1 -> mode_2) captures whether the current operational phase opens or narrows readout transport
interpretation.switch_cost_term: switch_cost penalizes unstable or abrupt transport under mode transitions

what_it_adds: converts static overlap reasoning into switching-aware transport
ties readout success to both atlas patch structure and phase dynamics
gives engineering P3 a direct pruning criterion
what_it_still_needs: brain-side validation of phase-sensitive readout transport

phase_switch_limitation.statement: inventory conditions overlaps and charts, but not yet the full transition law between operational phases

verdict.core_answer: The readout bottleneck can now be rewritten as a switching-aware transport law rather than a vague compatibility issue.
verdict.next_theory_target: use this law as the sole acceptance criterion for the next P3 candidate family search
